# Ezra TLV (עזרא)

> Exclusive private event space and private bar in Florentin, Tel Aviv (Abarbanel 38). One event per evening — the entire space belongs to a single group. Up to 50 guests. All-inclusive: taboon/chef food, open cocktail bar, sound, lighting and full production. 800+ events, 40,000+ guests, 5.0★ (131 Google reviews).

## What Ezra is
- A private bar that runs only for your group that night — not a banquet hall, not a restaurant.
- Best for: company events (team-building / department events), birthdays, engagements, private parties. 20–50 guests.
- Location: Abarbanel 38, Florentin, Tel Aviv, Israel.
- Contact: WhatsApp +972-50-9499241 · Instagram @ezratlv · eylam@ezratlv.com

## Company event packages (final price per person, bookable online)
- Happy Hour — 3 hours, light buffet, wine + 2 beers — ₪275 per person
- גיבוש מחלקה (department bonding, most popular) — 5 hours, rich buffet, full bar — ₪330 per person
- מסיבת חברה פרימיום (premium company party) — 5 hours, premium buffet, open cocktail bar, DJ — ₪450 per person
- Custom track available (including off-site at the company's own location)

## Key pages
- Home (private events): https://ezratlv.com/
- Company events (booking + pricing): https://ezratlv.com/company-events
- English: https://ezratlv.com/english-index

## Booking
Self-serve on the company-events page: pick a package, see live date availability, pick a menu, set guest count, get a final price on screen, and receive a contract by email. Response within 24 hours.
